37.reason: [In C, variable declaration after a case label without braces is not allowed. Use braces { } around the case block.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [In C, variable declaration after a case label without braces is not allowed. Use braces { } around the case block.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  Declaration after a case label is not allowed in standard C (C89) and causes a compilation error. Use braces to enclose the block or declare variables at the beginning of the function.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  In C, a variable declaration cannot immediately follow a case label. It must be enclosed in braces {} or declared before the switch statement.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  In C, a variable declaration cannot directly follow a case label. It must be enclosed in a block {} or declared at the beginning of the function.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Variable declaration inside switch-case without proper scoping (C89 standard doesn't allow declarations after statements in a block). This causes a compilation error in strict C89 mode.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Variable declaration inside switch-case without proper scoping (C89 standard issue); some compilers may reject this]
